title: Terraform VPC & Networking Module
description: Define VPC, Public/Private Subnets across 3 AZs, NAT Gateways, and Security Groups.
acceptance_criteria: VPC created with CIDR 10.0.0.0/16; Subnets in 3 AZs; Internet access verified
definition_of_done: Terraform applied; Network reachability tests passed

title: Provision RDS PostgreSQL with pgvector
description: Deploy RDS instance, configure security groups, create database, and enable pgvector extension.
acceptance_criteria: RDS accessible from VPC; pgvector extension verified; Encryption enabled

title: Provision Secure S3 Buckets & Policies
description: Create buckets for 'raw-sow' and 'sanitized-sow'. Configure Block Public Access, Versioning, and KMS Encryption.
acceptance_criteria: Buckets created; Public access blocked; KMS enabled

title: Python Worker SQS Consumer Skeleton
description: Setup Python service, Dockerfile, and robust SQS consumer loop with idempotency checks and Dead Letter Queue handling.
acceptance_criteria: Service connects to SQS; Messages acknowledged on success; Errors routed to DLQ
definition_of_done: LocalStack integration test passed; Docker build success

title: Stripe Service Configuration & Client Implementation
description: Setup C# Stripe Service wrapper with configuration for keys, webhooks, and retry policies.
acceptance_criteria: Service injected via DI; Config loaded from Secrets; Stripe API auth verified
definition_of_done: Unit tests passing; Stripe Mock connection verification

title: Tailwind & Theme Configuration
description: Configure Tailwind with project color palette, typography, and breakpoints. Implement Dark Mode toggle via CSS variables.
acceptance_criteria: Tailwind config matches design; Dark mode persists; Typography scale defined
definition_of_done: Visual inspection of styleguide; Linting passed

title: Base Component Library - Primitives
description: Implement Button, Input, Card, and Badge components using Radix UI primitives for accessibility.
acceptance_criteria: Variants implemented; Fully accessible (keyboard nav, ARIA); Responsive
definition_of_done: Storybook stories created; Axe scan passing
business_value: Accelerates UI development with reusable blocks

title: Terraform EKS Cluster & Node Groups
description: Provision Control Plane, Managed Node Groups, and IAM Roles for Service Accounts (IRSA).
acceptance_criteria: Control plane 1.29+ active; Nodes in private subnets; IRSA configured
definition_of_done: kubectl get nodes returns Ready; Terraform apply clean

title: Invoice Creation Logic & DB Schema
description: Implement business logic to calculate invoice totals (including platform fees/tax) and persist Invoice entity.
sprint_goal: Core Business Logic & AI Processing Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Tax calculated correctly; Invoice persisted in Pending; Linked to Client/Project
definition_of_done: Unit tests pass; DB schema migration script created

title: SOW Document Retrieval & Text Extraction
description: Implement logic to download SOW from S3 and extract text from PDF/DOCX formats.
sprint_goal: Core Business Logic & AI Processing Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Downloads file via S3 key; Extracts raw text; Handles corrupt files
definition_of_done: Unit tests with sample PDFs; Error handling verified
business_value: Extracts raw data for AI processing

title: PII Detection & Redaction Logic
description: Integrate AWS Comprehend or Regex/Spacy to detect entities and replace them with placeholders.
sprint_goal: Core Business Logic & AI Processing Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Identifies 90%+ PII; Replaces with placeholders; Preserves structure
definition_of_done: Test against PII dataset passed; Privacy check

title: Complex Component Library - Overlays
description: Implement Dialog (Modal), Toast (Notifications), and Dropdown Menu using Radix primitives.
sprint_goal: Core Business Logic & AI Processing Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Dialog traps focus; Toast manager handles queue; Dropdowns accessible
business_value: Critical UI patterns for user interaction

title: Configure Cluster Autoscaler & Metrics Server
description: Deploy Metrics Server and Cluster Autoscaler via Helm charts within Terraform.
sprint_goal: Core Business Logic & AI Processing Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Metrics API active; Autoscaler detects ASGs and scales

title: Stripe Payment Intent & Link Generation
description: Create Stripe PaymentIntent or Checkout Session based on Invoice data and generate secure payment URL.
sprint_goal: Core Business Logic & AI Processing Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Creates valid Session; Returns secure URL; Stores Session ID

title: OpenAI Integration for Structured Data Extraction
description: Design prompts and implement OpenAI API calls to extract Scope, Timeline, Budget, and Skills into structured JSON.
acceptance_criteria: Extracts fields to schema; Handles rate limits; Validates output JSON

title: Database Persistence & Embedding Generation
description: Generate vector embeddings for extracted skills/scope via OpenAI Embeddings API and persist all data to PostgreSQL.
acceptance_criteria: Generates embeddings; Saves JSON/Vectors to DB; Updates status
definition_of_done: DB query verification; Vector search test

title: Stripe Webhook Handler Implementation
description: Implement secure webhook endpoint to receive 'payment_intent.succeeded' events, verify signature, and update statuses.
acceptance_criteria: Verifies Signature; Handles Idempotency; Updates Invoice/Project status
definition_of_done: Stripe CLI trigger test pass; Dead letter logic implemented
